input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.1.3
            TITLE: team responsibility

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.1.3: Team Responsibility
IN.1.3 Team Responsibility 
Teams must make sure that their vehicle, and the required equipment, obeys the Formula SAE 
Rules before Technical Inspection.

final_answer: Teams must make sure that their vehicle, and the required equipment, obeys the Formula SAE Rules before Technical Inspection.
